macro.title: Media scion James Murdoch buys New York magazine, Vox.com - The Washington Post
macro.summary: Other Vox titles, including Eater, Popsugar, SB Nation, the Dodo, and the Verge, are not included in the transaction. They will make up a second, independent company under a new name.

macro.title: Oil Prices Fall Below $100 On Report Iran Deal Could Be Close. Don't Get Too Excited. - Investor's Business Daily
macro.summary: The S&P 500 and travel stocks rose. But don't get too excited yet.

macro.title: Samsung’s union puts off strike after reaching last-minute wage deal with management - AP News
macro.summary: Samsung Electronics’ labor union says it’ll hold off a planned strike and put a tentative wage deal with management to a vote. The announcement on Wednesday night alleviates concerns about the operation of the world’s largest memory chip maker. Union leader C…

macro.title: S&P 500 rises as oil falls and traders await Nvidia’s earnings: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: Chipmaker and AI darling Nvidia will report first-quarter earnings after Wednesday's closing bell.

macro.title: Lowe’s Earnings Defy Downbeat Housing Market. Why the Stock Is Falling. - Barron's
macro.summary: Lowe's stock was dropping after it beat earnings expectations but warned of a challenging housing market.
